titleStmt.title: SII 9.461: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 461. (A.R. No. 390 of 1927.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE HARIHARA TEMPLE AT KUMBHAKASI, COONDAPUR TALUK, SAME DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is damaged and dated Śaka 1389, Sarvajit, Prathama-Bhādrapada, śu. 15 corresponding to A.D. 1467 August 15, Saturday with a lunar eclipse, as stated. It refers itself to the reign of Virūpāksharāyā-Mahārāya and records that Viṭharasa-Voḍeya, who was ruling over Bārakūra-rājya under the orders of the Mahāpradhāna Kāchappa-Daṇṇāyaka, made a grant of gold for the service of the god Mahādēva at Kuṁbhāsi (the present Kuṁbhakāśi). The gift was made for the prosperity of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
(śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmara)
śrīgaṇādhipatayē namaḥ . śrīsarasvatyainamaḥ . nirvighnamastu . namastuṁga śiraścuṁ
gacaṁdracāmaracāravē . trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . svasti śrījayādbhudayaśā
livāhanaśakavaruṣa 1389 saṁdu toṁbhattaneya varttamāne sarvvajitusaṁva
tsarada prathamabhādrapada śu 15 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja paramēśvara śrī
vīrapratāpa virupākṣarāyamahārāyarū vijayānagariya siṁhvāsanadalli ku
ḷitu sakalavarnāśramadharmaṁgaḷanu pratipālisi sukharājyaṁgeyuttiha
kāladalū virūpākṣarāyamahārāyara Āgnādhārakarumappa śrīmanmahā
pradhānaṁ kācappadaṁṇāyakavoḍeyara nirūpadiṁda viṭharasavoḍeyaru bāra
kūra rājyavanāḷuttiha kāladalli virūpākṣarāyamahārāyarige Āyurārō
gya Aiśvaryābhivṛddhiyāgabēkeṁdu sōmōparāgapu(ṁ)ṇyakāladalli kuṁbhāśiya
śrīmahādēvarige nityaśrībaliya kaṭṭaḷege dhāreyaneṟada dharmaśāsanada kramaveṁ
teṁdare kuḍukūragrāmada Oḷage Aṁṇahatvāranu na(ṁ)mma Aramanege teṟu
va biṁjāḍiya Adhivāsada Oḷage taṁna hadimodalu Appaṇeya ba
geyiṁda kāṭi ga 55 kāṭi AyivattaAyidu paḍuva maneya hatvā ra
nū na(ṁ)mma Āramanege teṟuva koṟavaḍiya Adhivāsada Oḷage taṁna
hadi modalu Appaṇeya bageyiṁ kāṭi ga 45 kāṭi nālvattaA
yidu kāṭi Ubhayaṁ kāṭi ga 100 kāṭi nūṟu dēvara paṁjina Eṁṇeya
kaṭaḷege Aṁṇahatāraniṁ na(ṁ)mma Aramanege biṁjāḍiya hadimodalu Appaṇeya
honninoḷage kāṭi ga 9 Akṣaradalu Oṁbhattu kāṭi paḍuva maneya hatvāranū naṁma
Aramanege teṟuva koṟavaḍiya Ādhivāsada Oḷage ta(ṁ)nna hadimodalu Appa
ṇeya bageyiṁ kāṭi ga 6 Āṟu Ubhayaṁ paṁjina Eṁṇeya kaṭaḷege kāṭi ga
15 Akṣaradalu hadinaidu kāṭi Ubhayaṁ nityaśrībaliya kaṭṭaḷe paṁjina Eṁ
ṇeya kaṭṭaḷege kāṭi ga 115 Akṣaradalū nūṟahadinaidu kāṭiyanū nāu sa
hira(ṁ)ṇyōdakadhārādattapūrvakavāgi dhāṟeyaneradu koṭevāgi Ācaṁ
drārkkasthāyiyāgi śrībaliya dharmavanū kuṁbhāseya śrīmahādēvara
gaḷu Aṁṇahatvāra paḍuva maneya hatvāra yibarū kūḍi �yo dharmma
lla tappade naḍasi baharu mahādēvarige haṁnera
śrībali baharu �yo dharmmake ya
koṭṭa dharmaśilāśāsana tappade viṭharasa
. dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānācchrēyōnupālanaṁ (.) dānātsvarggama
lanādaccutaṁ padaṁ . �yo dharma vāraṇāsiyalli
ḍagali Aḷipidavarige vāraṇāsili braṁhatya
hōharu Aṁṇāhatvara Oppa paḍuva mane hatvara Oppa .
Digital edition of SII 9.461 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
